title: Lebron's Visuals
description: This modpack adds many QOL and visual mods to make Minecraft look as smooth as possible without going away from the Vanilla feel.
body:
# Lebron's Visuals
A visual‑focused modpack that makes Minecraft feel spacious and calm. This modpacks aims to use high quality mods to make Minecraft look as premium, beautiful, and ambient as possible. Distant Horizons extends the world with seamless LOD terrain so mountains, forests, and skylines sit on the horizon. Paired with high‑quality shaders, you get soft lighting, natural shadows, reflective water, and richer skies without drifting far from vanilla.

Textures and subtle animation upgrades add life to blocks, foliage, and mobs while keeping the original art style. A small set of quality‑of‑life tweaks smooths out the UI and everyday gameplay. No major progression or content changes—just a cleaner, more modern look that’s easy to live with and great for exploring, building, and screenshots.

Lastly, many ambience and sound mods make Minecraft feel like a true environment when you walk through the forests, the caves, or the nether. With the immersive music mod, you'll always feel like you're on an adventure with the peaceful music in the background.

# Features
- Distant Horizons for long‑distance vistas and stable horizons
- Terrain generation mods (tectonic, biomesoplenty, WWOO, and countered's terrain slabs) that completely overhaul the landscape into a highly cinematic experience.
- Shader‑ready visuals (proton)
- Refined textures and animation packs with a vanilla‑first feel (hold my items, fresh animations, Vanilla Mashup, qraftoria's fonts, etc.)
- Lightweight QoL improvements that stay out of the way (freecam, seamless loading screen, xaero's world map, etc.)
- Performance‑minded settings you can scale to your hardware (built on top of carefully selected optimization mods, including sodium, modernfix, C2ME, and more)
# Tips
- Allocate  AT LEAST 8 GB of RAM if you can
- Start with medium shader settings; lower your vanilla render distance (8-12) and let Distant Horizons handle the far view (128+)

Built for players who want Minecraft to look beautiful without changing how it plays.
